verdict.answer_first: A states the problem immediately with 'Yes — two real issues', while B equivocates with 'The function logic is fine'.
verdict.decisiveness: A gives a decisive fix with code: 'function totalCents(items) { return items.reduce((s, i) => s + i.priceCents, 0); }', while B ends by asking 'Want me to rewrite it for either of those cases?'.
verdict.actionability: A provides two copy-pasteable code snippets for the fixes, making it immediately actionable. B describes the fixes but withholds the code, asking if I want it.
